title: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist': Scary and Essential
description: Daniel Roher, the director of "Navalny," has made a heady documentary that explores the future of artificial intelligence with fearlessly open eyes.
content: “The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist” is a scary, dizzying and essential documentary. If you have any interest in artificial intelligence (that is: the future), you should go out and see it right now. The film was co-directed by Daniel Rohe... [7640 chars]

title: The Rapid Expansion of Financial Technology Innovation
description: Patent filings related to financial technology grew 34% year over year in 2025, reaching more than 18,000 new filings globally, according to the World Intellectual Property Organization’s annual technology trends report. The surge in fintech patents reflects a broader acceleration in financial technology innovation that spans artificial intelligence, blockchain, biometric authentication, and programmable money. title: Inflation Pulse From AI and Energy Will Last Decades, IFM Says
description: Enormous spending on artificial intelligence and the global energy transition are likely to cause inflationary pressures for decades to come, according to the chief executive of global infrastructure money manager IFM Investors.
content:

title: Beyond Exposure: PR Newswire Elevates Trusted Distribution Across Asia-Pacific
description: HONG KONG, March 26, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- PR Newswire has reinforced its Asia‑Pacific distribution network by expanding trusted media partnerships and upgrading its Premium Wire coverage across key markets. This upgrade happened in response to the quickly evolving market affected by Artificial intelligence, generative search, and a fragmented media landscape. The communications industry in APAC is prioritizing building credible, measurable, and sustained influence with stakeholders.

title: Australia needs more data centres, but there are new national expectations for investors
description: As demand for artificial intelligence accelerates, Australia is expanding its data centre footprint while facing rising concerns over energy and water use. The federal government has introduced new guidelines for those looking to expand or build in AI. The listed expectations are: prioritise Australia's national interest, support Australia's energy transition, use water sustainably and responsibly, invest in Australian skills and jobs; and strengthen research, innovation and local capability.
content:
Federal Government is laying out a plan aiming to ensure sustainability, as investment in data centres grows.

title: Google to verify apps, help track finfluencers: Sebi
description: Sebi is collaborating with Google to combat financial influencers who break rules. Artificial intelligence will be used to identify and remove these individuals from online spaces. A verified badge is now available on Google Play for stock trading apps from registered entities. This initiative aims to protect retail investors from fraudulent apps and misleading content.
